title: canarium merrillii
intro: Canarium merrillii, also known as the Philippine canarium or calantas, is a plant species native to the Philippines and other parts of Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The plant's health benefits include the potential treatment of various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its high content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. Canarium merrillii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or salves, making it a versatile remedy in traditional medicine.
